description_long: A male doctor stands upright with arms extended horizontally, dressed in a long white medical coat that reaches to the knees. He has short, dark hair and a clean-shaven face, with a serious expression. The coat features a visible medical identification badge on the left chest, and underneath, he wears light brown pants and black shoes. His hands and forearms are covered in black gloves, which contrast with the white coat. The overall appearance is professional and clean, suitable for a clinical or hospital environment. The figure is proportioned realistically, with attention to the details of the clothing and accessories.
description: A male doctor in a white coat with a medical badge, black gloves, brown pants, and black shoes, standing with arms outstretched.
description_view_0: Front view showing the doctor's face, white coat with badge, black gloves, brown pants, and black shoes.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the length of the white coat, and the black glove on the left arm.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, the full length of the white coat, and both arms extended.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the face, the right black glove, and the side seam of the coat and pants.
